title: Panicum cahoonianum

The species name cahoonianum is likely derived from a person's name, indicating its discovery or classification by that individual. Within the Poaceae family, Panicum cahoonianum is closely related to other grass species such as Panicum virgatum and Panicum capillare. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Panicum cahoonianum.
